MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Apr-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Daniel Ojeda, Celeste Ojeda's Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Demand For Statement Of Damanges, and Further Responses To Form and Special Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond to the Request For Production of Documents and her failure to respond fully to Form and Special Interrogatories was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to the Request For Production of Documents and to respond further to Form and Special Interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $377.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
